HOW IT WORKS

easy to make, ready in seconds

honestly, it's just fruits & veggies

Some people are skeptical - we get it. But it happens to be true: the only ingredients we use are plants. No colors, flavor enhancers, preservatives or fillers. No added sugars or artificial sweeteners. Just the world’s best produce, with the water taken out so that the nutrients stay in.

learn more

five-a-day, on the go

There’s never been an easier way to reach your recommended five cups of daily fruits and vegetables. All the nutrients and flavor from real produce, and none of the hassle.

Save Time

Get Nourished

Cut Waste

  • "These smoothies make those hungry down times so much healthier"

  • "This freeze-dried smoothie company is delicious and cost-effective"

  • "This founder says his simple nutrition solution can help tackle food waste in a big way"

  • "These smoothies make those hungry down times so much healthier"

free nutrition coaching

The recommended daily intake of fruits and veggies for adults is five servings. kencko’s team of Registered Dietitians is here to help you build healthy habits - and stick to them. We offer free, friendly, nutrition education with a ‘health at every size’ approach.

learn more

love fruit, hate waste?

We freeze-dry real produce to keep it fresher for longer. That means you can eat more fruits and vegetables with less impact on the planet.

learn more
